• 3D voxel racing game with terrain generation using Simplex noise
  • Multiplayer support via MQTT with real-time player synchronization
  • Interactive UI with minimap, speedometer, chat, and mobile controls
  • Day/night cycle, particle effects, and soundboard integration
    class TerrainSystem { generateChunk(cx, cz) { const geometry = new THREE.PlaneGeometry(chunkSize, chunkSize, resolution, resolution); /* ... */ } }
    class NetworkManager { connect(brokerUrl) { this.client = mqtt.connect(brokerUrl); /* ... */ } }

Voxel Racer is a browser-based 3D racing game featuring procedurally generated terrain, multiplayer functionality through MQTT, and a comprehensive UI system. The game includes day/night cycles, particle effects, and supports both desktop and mobile controls for an immersive racing experience.
